title: Phanera aurea
taxonomy: Phanera aurea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae, commonly known as the cashew family. It is a genus within this family that is native to tropical Asia. Phanera aurea is a type of climbing plant with unique features. Within the Anacardiaceae family, Phanera aurea is categorized as a member of the subfamily Anacardioideae. Further classification would place it in the tribe Anacardieae, which is a group of flowering plants within the subfamily Anacardioideae.
